fileQa.poweredBy: Powered by GenChat Engine • 128k Context Window
fileQa.welcome: Hello! I've indexed your uploaded documents. You can ask specific questions about the 2024 Market Report or the Architecture Diagram. How can I help you today?
fileQa.userQuestion: What are the predictions for the second half of the year in this document?
fileQa.aiAnswerIntro: According to page 42 of the 2024 Market Report:
fileQa.quote: "From Q3 to Q4 2024, AI-driven SaaS market share is expected to increase by 18%. In Asia-Pacific, enterprise AI spending growth may reach 24% due to policy incentives..."
fileQa.aiAnswerOutro: The Architecture Diagram also shows infrastructure expansion plans for H2 to meet the predicted growth.
fileQa.welcomeEmpty: Upload a document to start asking questions about its content.
fileQa.welcomeWithFile: I've indexed "{{name}}". Ask me anything about this file.
